popularStory.description: William de Vesci (c.1125–1184) was an Anglo-Norman feudal lord and Sheriff. Born William fitz Eustace at Knaresborough Castle, Yorkshire, the son of Eustace Fitz John and Beatrix de Vesci, he took his …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Vesci於1125年出生在英國越可爾可納雷斯波洛時，他的父親Eustace fitz John11122歲，母親Beatrix de Vesci31歲。他於1169年之前與Burga de Stuteville在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1174年登記服兵役。他於1166年被列為sheriff of lancashire。他去世於1183年9月在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年58歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Vesci于1125年出生在英国越可爾可納雷斯波洛时，他的父亲Eustace fitz John11122岁，母亲Beatrix de Vesci31岁。他于1169年之前与Burga de Stuteville在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1174年登记服兵役。他于1166年被列为sheriff of lancashire。他去世于1183年9月在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年58岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vesci
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Calabria): patronymic or plural form of   Vescio  .

variants.name: Vescio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Carmela, Ettore, Pasquale, Serafino, Vito.

Italian: probably a nickname from Calabrese dialect vesciu ‘cross-eyed person’ or vescia ‘kind of mushroom’. In Italy the surname is most frequent in Calabria, specifically in Lamezia Terme in Catanzaro province.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Vesci was born in 1125, in Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England, his father, Eustace fitz John, was 11122 and his mother, Beatrix de Vesci, was 31. He married Burga de Stuteville before 1169, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1174. In 1166, his occupation is listed as sheriff of lancashire. He died in September 1183, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Alnwick, Northumberland, England.

fr.Ambushed at Consyllt, near Basingwerk Ab: Abbey, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Vesci est né en 1125, à Knaresborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Eustace fitz John, avait 11122 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Vesci, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Burga de Stuteville avant 1169, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1174. En 1166, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of lancashire. Il est décédé en septembre 1183, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Vesci 1125 in Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustace fitz John 11122 und seine Mutter Beatrix de Vesci 31. Er hat vor 1169 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England Burga de Stuteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1174 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1166 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of lancashire aufgeführt. Er starb im September 1183 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Alnwick, Northumberland, England und wurde in Alnwick, Northumberland, England begraben.

ht.Ambushed at Consyllt, near Basingwerk Ab: Abbey, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Vesci è nato il nel 1125 nel Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Eustace fitz John, aveva 11122 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix de Vesci, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Burga de Stuteville prima del 1169, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1174. Nel 1166, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of lancashire. Morì nel settembre 1183, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Alnwick, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Vesciが1125年にイギリスヨークシュアイアナレスボロウで生まれた時，父Eustace fitz Johnは11122歳，母Beatrix de Vesciは31歳であった。1169年以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックでBurga de Stutevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1174年に兵役登録をした。1166年，職業はsheriff of lancashireと記録されている。彼は1183年9月にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで58歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Vesci(이)가 1125년 영국 요르크실르 나레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustace fitz John(은)는 11122세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix de Vesci(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1169년 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 Burga de Stuteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1174년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1166년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of lancashire이었다. 그는 1183년 9월 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Vesci nasceu em 1125, em Knaresborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Eustace fitz John, tinha 11122 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Vesci, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Burga de Stuteville antes 1169, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1174. Em 1166, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of lancashire. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1183, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ro.Ambushed at Consyllt, near Basingwerk Ab: Abbey, Pembrokeshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Vesci родился в 1125 г. в местности наресбороую, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Eustace fitz John было 11122 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Vesci, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Burga de Stuteville перед 1169 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1174 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1166 годуработал по профессии sheriff of lancashire. Он умер сентябрь 1183 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Vesci nació en 1125, en Knaresborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Eustace fitz John, tenía 11122 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Vesci, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Burga de Stuteville antes de 1169, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1174. En 1166, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of lancashire. Murió en septiembre de 1183, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
